top3.sql:
SELECT format, name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
GROUP BY l.format, c.name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(format_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS format_count
        FROM legalities
        WHERE status = 'Banned'
        GROUP BY format
    )
);

SELECT format, COUNT(*) as banned_count
FROM legalities
WHERE status = 'Banned'
GROUP BY format
ORDER BY banned_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH banned_formats AS (
    SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
    ORDER BY banned_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
max_banned_format AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_formats
)
SELECT l.format, c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format = (SELECT format FROM max_banned_format);

SELECT format, name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
GROUP BY l.format, c.name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(format_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS format_count
        FROM legalities
        WHERE status = 'Banned'
        GROUP BY format
    )
);

SELECT format, COUNT(*) as banned_count
FROM legalities
WHERE status = 'Banned'
GROUP BY format
ORDER BY banned_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

WITH banned_formats AS (
    SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
    ORDER BY banned_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
max_banned_format AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_formats
)
SELECT l.format, c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format = (SELECT format FROM max_banned_format);

SELECT format, name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
GROUP BY l.format, c.name
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
    SELECT MAX(format_count)
    FROM (
        SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS format_count
        FROM legalities
        WHERE status = 'Banned'
        GROUP BY format
    )
);

WITH banned_counts AS (
    SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
),
top_banned_format AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_counts
    ORDER BY cnt DESC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT l.format, c.asciiName AS card_name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format = (SELECT format FROM top_banned_format);

final.sql:
WITH banned_formats AS (
    SELECT format, COUNT(*) AS banned_count
    FROM legalities
    WHERE status = 'Banned'
    GROUP BY format
    ORDER BY banned_count DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
max_banned_format AS (
    SELECT format
    FROM banned_formats
)
SELECT l.format, c.name
FROM legalities l
JOIN cards c ON l.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE l.status = 'Banned'
  AND l.format = (SELECT format FROM max_banned_format);
